description: MapGuide tour configuration. Shows how the AI tour planner takes preferences (travel mode, distance, sources, categories) to build personalized walking tours. Stops before the actual tour generation because that requires an explicit picked location which the simulator's GPS override doesn't auto-fill — real-device version (Phase D) will show full tour generation + AI Guide Insight per stop.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Heading somewhere new? Let AI plan the route.

scenes.name: Tap Map
scenes.narration: Open Map to see what's around you.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Open Map to see what's around you.

scenes.name: Open Tours
scenes.narration: Tap Tours to discover guided walks around your location.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap Tours to find guided walks nearby.

scenes.name: Start a tour
scenes.narration: Start a tour - the AI will pick the best stops.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Start a tour and the AI picks the best stops.

scenes.name: Configure travel mode
scenes.narration: Walking, biking, or driving - pick what fits.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Walking, biking, or driving - pick what fits.

scenes.name: Pick sources
scenes.narration: Sources from Wikipedia and Apple Maps for rich coverage.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Wikipedia plus Apple Maps for rich place coverage.

scenes.name: Pick categories
scenes.narration: Filter by what you care about - history, museums, landmarks, parks.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Filter by history, museums, landmarks - what you care about.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Real-time AI tours, ready when you are. Get mChatAI on the App Store.
